title: Racosperma abruptum
taxonomy: Racosperma abruptum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub native to Western Australia. The plant's classification has undergone changes, previously being known as Acacia abruptum. The classification is based on various characteristics, including its morphology and phylogenetic relationships. Racosperma abruptum's classification is a subject of ongoing research and study.
